sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44404" key="eu)loxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐλοχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44404.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">glorious progeny,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Is.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">156</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
